passive.name: Astral Evolvement
passive.description: Increase HP by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. Restore 8/10/12/14/16 Concerto Energy when casting Resonance Liberation. This effect can be triggered 1/1/1/1/1 time(s) every 20/20/20/20/20s. When casting Resonance Skill that heals, increase nearby party members' ATK by 14%/17.5%/21%/24.5%/28% for 30/30/30/30/30s. Effects of the same name cannot be stacked.
